response.overview: A bachelorette weekend deep in the woods turns deadly when a massive Bengal tiger escapes from a city zoo after a storm knocks out its enclosure. The women brush off eerie sounds outside-until shredded footprints and blood smears appear around the cabin. With no phone signal, honour's bridge washed out, they must outsmart a skilled predator who sees them as prey... and the maid of honour's bright-red dress might be the first target.
response.title: Tiger Attack
